SQLLite.SQL: SELECT PRE.STD_EVENT_ID AS "EventId" , PRE.PRE_REQ_EVENT_ID1 AS "PreReqEventId1", PRE.PRE_REQ_EVENT_ID2 AS "PreReqEventId2", PRE.PRE_REQ_EVENT_ID3 AS "PreReqEventId3", PRE.PRE_REQ_EVENT_ID4 AS "PreReqEventId4", PRE.DEF_DEPENDANT AS "DefendantDependant", PRE.MESSAGE_STATUS AS "MessageStatus" FROM PRE_REQ_EVENTS PRE WHERE PRE.STD_EVENT_ID = ${param.eventId}
